items.content: Jupyter Notebooks are essential for Priya's daily workflow. She uses them extensively for data exploration, model development, and visualization in Python, leveraging libraries like Pandas, Scikit-learn, and Matplotlib.
GitHub is critical for version control and collaboration with her data science team. Priya uses it to manage code repositories, track changes, and review pull requests for ML projects.

The company's internal documentation portal on Confluence serves as a primary reference. Priya uses it to access project specifications, research findings, and best practices for healthcare analytics.
Dr. Ananya Roy (ananya.roy@colleague.com) is a key collaborator. Priya frequently consults with her on statistical methodologies and validation approaches for predictive models.
Priya regularly consults Towards Data Science for articles and tutorials on new ML techniques and best practices. It helps her stay updated with the latest advancements in the field.
The 'Sangamam' Carnatic Music Academy website is a vital resource for her musical pursuits. Priya uses it to find concert schedules, riyaz (practice) sessions, and connect with fellow musicians.
Her yoga instructor, Meera Patel (meera.yoga@email.com), provides guidance and schedules for daily practice. Priya values this for maintaining her well-being and focus.
